description: Unified property listing queries both flats and houses
steps: Verify listAllProperties function is exported from packages/web/lib/firestore.ts
Verify getFeaturedProperties function is exported from packages/web/lib/firestore.ts

description: Unified properties browse page renders at /properties
steps: Verify route 'properties' is registered in packages/web/app/routes.ts pointing to routes/properties._index.tsx
Verify properties._index.tsx imports and uses PropertyFilters component
Verify properties._index.tsx imports and uses PropertyCard component
Verify the page has a type toggle for All/Flats/Houses filtering
Verify the page renders price and bedroom filter controls

description: PropertyFilters component provides type, price, and bedroom filtering
steps: Verify it renders type toggle buttons (All, Flats, Houses)
Verify it renders price range inputs (min, max)
Verify it calls onFilterChange callback when filters change

description: PropertyCard component renders FlatCard or HouseCard based on type
steps: Verify PropertyCard component exists at packages/web/components/PropertyCard.tsx
Verify it renders FlatCard when __propertyType is 'flat'
Verify it renders HouseCard when __propertyType is 'house'
